title: ochrosia mulsantii
intro: Ochrosia mulsantii, also known as the Yellow Oleander or Yellow Jessamine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia mulsantii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Ochrosia mulsantii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
